name: Sichuan Street Noodles with Spicy Peanut Sauc
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together minced garlic, tahini, steeped black Chinese tea, dark soy sauce, chili oil, 2 tablespoons sesame oil, sugar, and red wine vinegar until smooth.
2. Prepare the noodles and cool under running water.
3. Add 1 tablespoon sesame oil to the noodles and toss until well combined.
4. Mix in the spicy peanut sauce and chopped scallions, tossing until well combined.
5. Add shredded cucumber and toss again.
6. Serve at room temperature.
Yield: 8 servings
